title: Human Capital Management (HCM)
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose of SAP Human Capital Management (HCM).
Learn the key functions of HCM.
Understand employee lifecycle management in SAP.
Identify commonly used SAP HCM Transaction Codes.
Learn how HCM integrates with other SAP modules.

introduction.title: What is SAP HCM?
introduction.content: SAP Human Capital Management (HCM), also known as SAP Human Resources (HR), is used to manage employee information, organizational structure, attendance, payroll, recruitment, training and performance. It enables organizations to efficiently manage their workforce throughout the employee lifecycle.

business_purpose.title: Why is SAP HCM Used?
business_purpose.content: Employees are one of the most valuable assets of an organization. SAP HCM helps maintain employee records, automate HR processes, ensure accurate payroll, monitor attendance, and support employee development.

major_components.name: Personnel Administration
major_components.description: Maintains employee personal and employment information.

major_components.name: Organizational Management
major_components.description: Defines company structure, departments and reporting hierarchy.

major_components.name: Time Management
major_components.description: Records attendance, leave, overtime and work schedules.

major_components.name: Payroll
major_components.description: Calculates salaries, deductions, taxes and benefits.

major_components.name: Training & Event Management
major_components.description: Manages employee learning and development activities.

major_components.name: Performance Management
major_components.description: Tracks employee goals, appraisals and performance reviews.

integration.purpose: Payroll expenses are posted to Financial Accounting.
Employee costs are allocated to Cost Centers.
Maintenance technicians are assigned to maintenance orders.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: A new engineer joins the manufacturing plant. HR creates the employee master record, assigns the employee to the Production department, records attendance, schedules mandatory training, processes monthly payroll and maintains performance records using SAP HCM.
